list.txt: - Decent place, everything you need for a few days trip, great location!

- J'ai adoré mon séjour dans ce airbnb, qui est magnifique et très propre. Les lieux, en semaine, sont très tranquilles. Le vendredi et samedi soir, c'est plus bruyants dû aux activité nocturnes autour, mais c'est le prix à payer pour être au cœur de l'action.

- really handy in this wonderfully compact city with brilliant museums, parks and promenade. the flat was a brilliant base, comfortable and very much in the spirit of Airbnb it felt like a lived in home. it is even close to the c6 bus route to the airport. Diana was an excellent host, helpful and flexible to enable our early arrival.
- Spacious and comfortable apartment in a residential building. Less than 5 mins walk to the Mercado and local cafes and great bakery right on the doorstep. Home from home feeling.
- Mieszkanie bardzo czyste i ciche, chociaż w chałaśliwym centrum Alicante. Widoczków brak. Obok Mercadone i polski sklep jak by ktoś szukał czegoś z Polski. Wszystko zgodne z opisem. Polecam

- We had a lovely stay, the apartment was in the perfect location for us. There's loads of restaurants within walking distance whilst still being quiet. Cari was very friendly and showed us around the apartment, we would be more than happy to stay again.
- Very nice apartment.

- Great apartment right in the middle of Alicante old town. Really quiet private apartment great beds great nights sleep. Apartment has everything you need during your stay. Would definitely recommend this place.
- Thanks so much! The place was great and host very helpful and responsive. Lots of great spots all very walkable. Would highly recommend!

- Great communication. Very clean apartment. Rooftop terrace also very clean. We knew that there would be loud music at night, so we brought good earplugs which were definitely needed. Would recommend to friends and family.

Wonderful stay - Very spacious apartment. Great kitchen and bathroom. Bedroom was spacious and bed was very comfortable. Location was great, close to airport bus in Luceros. The complimentary coffee pods was a lovely gesture. Very much appreciated the communication from Diana and was very prompt to response to what's app messages if I had any queries. Would absolutely recommend this as a place to stay. My only negative was that the key box at the door of the apartment that contained the keys was a little difficult to open. I had to re-enter the code a few times to eventually get it open.

Great stay. - Big, nice, quiet, comfortable Check in was a little complex and they take a 200 euro additional damage fee (refundable) that you find out about just before checkin. Parking is 19.50 a day (not cheap)

- Много хубав и комфортен апартамент, на топ място, близо до всички забележителности, и много тих в същото време. Леглата и възглавтиците бяха удобни, кухнята е оборудвана с всичко необходимо, и много се зарадвах, че имаше и йога постелка за спорт. Прекарахме 5 незабрававими дни, а Диана и екипът й са винаги на разположение и реагират веднага. Горещо препоръчвам. Няма какво
- A lovely apartment great location and very well equipped. Also very helpful when I reported the bathroom cabinet falling apart..thank you and kind regards Marie.
Every recommendation - Spacious apartment, super clean and equipped, with cool terrace. Great location and helpful and nice host.
- Świetny apartament na weekendowy wypad! Było mega czysto, lokalizacja idealna, a kontakt z właścicielami bezproblemowy i bardzo miły. Wszystko na plus — zdecydowanie polecam ❣️👍
- Todo excelente. La ubicación. La atención muy buena, muy amables y considerados. Muy recomemdable, todo
- Place Very spacious, beds comfortable, everything great. Very good contact on WhatsApp. It is not a new apartment, but everything works.
- Everything, Location, comfort, cleanliness No real balcony to speak of and no view. However we knew this when booking so not a complaint

- L'emplacement est proche du tram Lucero Arrêt de bus pour l'aéroport à proximité Le logement est fonctionnel, avec cafetière dolce gusto, bien équipé pour se faire à manger Grand frigo, terrasse appréciable. Forte odeur dans la salle de bain

Holiday in Alicante - Гарне розташування, легке заселення і зрозуміле. Чисто і зручно. Погано працював зелений ключ іноді треба було час щоб відчинити загальні двері , кран на кухні потрібно полагодити , постійно треба тримати двома руками.
- Schody nie są wcale uciążliwe No chyba że ktoś ma problemy z poruszaniem się.
Great place to stay, highly recommend - Clean, spacious, comfortable, well stocked Nothing

Super Lage, sehr sauber, tolle Dachterrasse - Top Lage, sehr zentral. Nur ein paar Minuten zum Hafen und zum Strand. Auf der anderen Seite ein paar Minuten zum Aufgang der Burg, die Dachterrasse war auch toll, alle Zimmer sehr sauber, Küche gut ausgestattet und das Extrabett (Schlafcouch) auch perfekt alles in bester Ordnung :)

Tunnelmallinen huoneiso Alicanten sydämessä! - Asunto oli tyylikkäästi sisustettu, siisti ja toimiva. Kattoterassi oli luksusta ja sieltä oli kaunis näkymä läheiselle vuorelle. Ja jopa tammikuussa pystyimme nauttimaan siellä iltapäivän auringosta. Sijainti oli erinomainen ja kävellen pääsimme helposti joka suuntaan. Hinta-laatusuhde majoituksessa oli enemmän kuin kohdillaan. Matkalaukkujen kantaminen huoneistoon kapeissa portaissa oli hieman hankalaa, mutta onnistui.

We really enjoyed our stay,it was a lovely and relaxing a home away from home. - The property was very close to everything, it was spotless and very comfortable. It had everything you would need for a stay away from home. We really enjoyed the roof top terrace bit of noise from the night club next door but they did provide ear plugs

Very enjoyable , comfortable stay , in a fantastic location , highly recommended. - Location was fantastic , really close to restaurants, bars , supermarkets , beach and marina. Apartment was spotlessly clean and had everything you could possibly need for your stay. I have no negatives about this property.
Je recommande - Sa situation géographique Sa propreté la literie excellente Les deux étages ds un escalier très étroit avec de grosses valises
First time to Alicanti & loved every moment - Roof terrace
- Beliggenhed Støj
- Top Kommunikation, tolle Terrasse

We had a fabulous time. This apartment is perfect for exploring Alicante. - The location was perfect and we especially appreciated the roof terrace which is very private with lovely views. We liked everything and it was as described
- Emplacement au cœur de la vieille ville équipement parfait confort extra Appartement un peu sombre au rez de chaussée

Perfect stay. - Great communication from the owners. Ideal location. Property was clean and spacious and we loved the roof terrace. Comfortable beds and property had everything we needed. Stairs to the penthouse are steep and narrow so wouldn't suit someone with reduced mobility.

- Чудове розташування: недалеко від моря, та в двох кроках від прекрасного району Санта Круз. Привітний персонал, що намагається допомогти в будь якому питанні. Просторі апартаменти, де є все необхідне. До продуктового магазину далекувато.

- Ми проживали декілька тижнів і нам було зручно та комфортно. Апартаменти були розташовані на першому поверсі, є окрема спальня, вітальня, кухня та санвузли. Укомплектовані усім необхідним. Було чисто та затишно. Персонал привітний та завжди на зв'язку. Нас пригостили пляшкою вина та цукерками. Нам було приємно та доречно з дороги. Відмінне розташування, близько до моря, магазинів та базару, у самому центрі. Нам все сподобалось
Fantasisch - De grootte van het appartement en de hygiëne. En ze waren erg lief de mensen die het appartement verhuurde Niks
Super Apartment in bester Lage - Sehr schönes Apartment. Gut ausgestattet und die Dachterrasse ist hervorragend. Die Lage ist super zentral und alles lässt sich zu fuß bewältigen. nichts

- Bylismy w 4 dorosłe osoby w apartemencie z tarasem. Mieszkanie bylo bardzo czyste. 5 minut od przystanku autobusowego z lotniska. Wszędzie blisko. Mieszkanie wyposażone przedmioty, jedynie brakowało małych kieliszków, ale to nie problem. Schody wewnątrz klatki schodowej jak i na taras dosyć wąskie ale osoby standardowej postury spokojnie dadzą radę. Widok bardzo ładny. W apartamencie jest jedna łazienka, bez oddzielnej toalety, co czasami było kłopotliwe. Poza tym wszystko ok. Polecam! 1 lazienka
- Tutto stupendo complimenti! Nulla

Lovely apartment in a great location. - Great location with everything needed to have a good city break. Very easy access to the rest of Alicante on foot plus some great restaurants and bars near bar. Quite quiet as it’s on a smaller side street! Only slight thing is that property photo shows roof terrace but we weren’t given that apartment which was slightly misleading. We liked our apartment though!

Lang leve het dakterras! - Zodra de kamer klaar was mochten we er in, ook al was dat voor het normale uur. De valiezen mochten we ook al veel vroeger afzetten. De gastvrouw was heel vriendelijk. Het appartement was heel gerieflijk proper, perfect! Wat een zalog dakterras! We waren er met ons zoontje van anderhalf jaar, tijdens dat hij sliep konden wij genieten op het dakterras. Perfecte locatie middenin het historisch centrum en toch rustig gelegen.

Lindo apartamento - A mi pareja y a mi nos gustó todo del apartamento, la bienvenida súper linda, una experiencia muy bonita, tanto por la comodidad que tuvimos como por la anfitriona Caridad, desde el primer momento nos recibió con la mejor actitud y amabilidad, también nos gustó mucho una libreta que tienen a la entrada del pasillo para poder escribir en ella, es un recuerdo muy bonito. Esperamos volver muy pronto, gracias por confiar en nosotros. Me gustó todo, no hay ninguna queja, volvería a hospedarme sin ninguna duda.
- posizione ottima, casa accogliente e pulita. gentilezza e professionalità host nulla
- Kainos ir kokybes santykis,lokacija,viskas yra ko gali prireikti. Netoli pagrindinis turgus,parduotuves,kavines.
Large apartment in great location - Superb location, very spacious, clean. Nothing, this was our second time staying, just as good as last year!
- There are no comments available for this review

Alt fint undtagen lejlighedens placering, som skulle være præciseret ved bookningen - God placering i midtbyen Lejligheden er veludstyret og ren Der ar en superfin og meget hjælpsom service fra stedet via whatsapp Lejligheden Da vi bookede kunne vi ikke se at lejligheden lå i stuen, og at der kun var et vindue, som ikke kunne være åbent , da det var lige ud til gaden. Følte vi var i en bunker

Excellent for parties and late nights out - This property is ideally located for hen and stag parties as it is in the middle of nightclubs and bars. The night club next door played music til 4am excellent for the party goer. The street it’s located on has interesting views. The smell from the toilets/shower drains was ok once the windows were left open.

Schöne Stadt, leider sehr laute Unterkunft - Die Lage war ganz ok. Bett war recht gut. Sehr laut von draußen, Aber auch Lift und Nachbarwohnung war sehr laut. Es stank in der Wohnung vom Kanal und auch der Kühlschrank stank penetrant nach Fisch.
- Todo por dentro muy comodo Las escaleras son horribles incomodas llegas sin poder respirar
- There are no comments available for this review

Great location, good choise - Great location. Easy check in and Diana and Amanda were very nice and helpful. Kitchen had everything we needed, even scissors and cutting board. Good bed and shower, great water preassure. Hairdryer was powerful. January was chilly in Alicante, but there was two airconditioners that warmed up the apartment very well. We stayed 5 nights and the lift was unreliable on last two days. They fixed it though when we left. It was suprise for us that the bed had a double blanket/duvet, we are so used to have separate ones. But it was ok when we got used to it.
- Dobře vybavený apartmán. Pohodlné postele. Úžasná terasa s krásným výhledem na hrad. -
Vacanza Pasquale - La proprietaria molto gentile, appartamento molto pulito, profumato, accogliente.Consiglio ottima struttura
- La ubicación ideal , el apartamento muy confortable y completo Hay que subir un piso , únicamente eso por las maletas
The location was great - The location was great. The flat had everything that we needed. Two bathrooms, one en-suite, was a bonus.
- Muito bem localizado e excelente apartamento
Enjoyed our stay at Abal Teatro because it was central for all our needs - Ideal location A little difficult to unlock the front door at the street
Lovely flat in great location - Great location. Great size with everything you need. Clean and comfortable. A bit chilly. WiFi didn’t reach bedroom.
- De locatie is perfect, gemakkelijke incheck en vriendelijk personeel
- Totul a fost minunat.
Perfect place great location A1 service - Perfect location.lovely and clean plenty of cutlery etc. lovely conservatory area to relax In the bathroom there was a sewer smell but not to severe
- Comfortable, cozy, perfect location Everything was great

Fabulous location! - Excellent old town location, hosts were really helpful, apartment was nice with comfy beds and outdoor terrace. Nothing. It's quite noisy on a Fri/sat night but this is because the location is so good near bars and restaurants.

Fab location and good proportions. - Location. Few minutes walk away from C6 airport bus and tram station. Plenty of cafes restaurants and supermarkets. Staff pleasant to deal with. Very approachable. Big appartment, plenty of room for 2 people so didn't feel on top of each other. Very neutral inside. Could do with a rug around bedside and sofa, especially in winter months. Maybe a blanket available for extra warmth for sofa and bed use. We like the option of an oven, not just microwave or hob. This appartment did not have an oven. Not that we cook much when on holiday but nice to have choices.

- Esta muy bien ubicado, es realmente hermoso y con todo lo necesario para pasarla bien. La comunicación es impecable. La terraza un lujo Si vas con cochecito de bebé/ niños es complicada la escalera. No opaca todo lo lindo que tiene el alojamiento
All very good and definitely recommend - It’s location Nothing, all good

- Nice and clean, bed and pillows very comfy. Great location for restaurants, beach, exploring. Water in the fridge on arrival. Very good communication from host and very helpful. Quite noisy on the weekend, one of the bedrooms was more quiet than the other. Ear plugs are available but could still hear the club music/parties. Sofa not very comfy.
- There are no comments available for this review
- There are no comments available for this review
- There are no comments available for this review

- Melhor região. Estacionamento privado bem próximo, bares, restaurante, mercados e passeios tudo muito perto. Só tem um pouco de dificuldade para abrir a porta da entrada e as escadas são estreitas, fora isso, muito bom. Anfitriões sempre prestativos a nos ajudar.

- Great location, easily walkable to the main streets and promenade. So many nice places to eat and drink around that area. Really private and secure apartment which was comfortable with everything you needed
Trevlig lägenhet med mycket bra läge - Kanonläge i gamla stan Lagom stor lägenhet för 3-4 pers

BUENA UBICACIÓN EN ALICANTE - La localización y las anfitriones muy amables y serviciales en todo momento. Apartamento muy limpio. Éramos cuatro, solo hay un sofá y a malas penas podíamos estar tres sentados. Las estancias todas bien salvo el salón que se queda pequeño.

Super Lage, nettes großes Apartment - Sehr gute Kommunikation, super Lage, sehr großes Apartment Apartment ist zu den Nachbarn sehr hellhörig (aber anscheinend typisch in Spanien) und die Betten schon etwas durchgelegen

Nice apartment with helpful hosts - The apartment was in an excellent condition. Although small it was clean and very functional with everything we needed. The location was perfect as everything we wanted to see and do in Alicante was within walking distance. The communication from the hosts was also excellent, with an early check in which was really helpful. There appears to be an issue with clarity re booking. We thought we had booked the apartment with a sun terrace, but instead had 2 small balconies which were too small to sit out on. This seems to be an issue others have had. There is also a club at the end of the block with loud music until 2/3 am on Fridays and Saturdays.
Fijn appartement; niet groot. - Heel centraal gelegen. Zeer vriendelijke hostess en duidelijke informatie. Sleutel uit kastje halen was lastig.
- Posizione, letti comodi Bagno molto piccolo
- There are no comments available for this review

Følte vi var i en bunker

eventos.name: Hombres G - Los Mejores Años de nuestra vida
